title: boronia barkeriana subsp. angustifolia
intro: Boronia barkeriana subsp. angustifolia is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Boronia genus, commonly known as the pink boronia, which is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has been traditionally used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The essential oil of Boronia barkeriana subsp. angustifolia has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and preventing infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
